relics.name: Lantern
relics.description: Gain +1 Energy on turn 1.

relics.name: Anchor
relics.description: Gain 8 Block on turn 1.

relics.name: Whetstone
relics.description: Your attacks deal +1 damage.

relics.name: Lucky Charm
relics.description: Heal 5 HP after each battle.

relics.name: Ember Ring
relics.description: Gain +1 Energy at the start of every turn.

relics.name: Iron Shell
relics.description: Gain 3 Block at the start of every turn.

relics.name: Blood Vial
relics.description: Heal 2 HP after each battle.

relics.name: Storm Feather
relics.description: Whenever you play your 3rd card each turn, gain 1 Energy next turn.

relics.name: Rune Kite
relics.description: When you discard 2+ cards in one turn, gain 4 Block.

relics.name: Cinder Tea
relics.description: After combat, if you lost HP this fight, heal 3 HP.

relics.name: Thorn Mail
relics.description: When attacked, deal 2 damage back to the attacker.

relics.name: Frozen Lens
relics.description: The first debuff card you play each turn applies +1 stack.

relics.name: Echo Coin
relics.description: Every 5 cards played in combat, draw 1 card.

relics.name: Twin Blade Badge
relics.description: The first Attack each turn hits twice for 60% damage.

relics.name: Warding Bell
relics.description: If your turn ends with 0 Block, gain 6 Block.

relics.name: Soul Compass
relics.description: Elite rewards offer one extra relic option.

relics.name: Overclock Core
relics.description: Every 4th Skill each combat costs 0.

relics.name: Glass Meteor
relics.description: Attacks deal +3 damage, but you take +1 damage from enemy attacks.

relics.name: Dawn Totem
relics.description: At turn 1, draw 1 extra card and gain 4 Block.

relics.name: Void Hourglass
relics.description: At the end of your turn, if you played no Attack, gain 1 Strength.

relics.name: Jade Cicada
relics.description: When HP is below 50%, gain 1 Artifact at combat start.

relics.name: Ember Chisel
relics.description: Whenever you Exhaust a card, gain 1 temporary Strength this turn.
